title: Block Components Redstone Producer
description: The definitions for how a block can produce a redstone signal.

connected_faces.title: Connected Faces
connected_faces.description:
The list of faces that are considered connected to the circuit. If a face is not connected, it will not provide power to the block touching that face.
By default, all faces are connected.

power.title: Power
power.description: The strength of the redstone signal produced by this block. 0 means no signal and higher numbers mean stronger signal.

strongly_powered_face.title: Facing
strongly_powered_face.description:
The block touching this face will become strongly powered with the signal level strength of "power".
Strongly powered blocks will power adjacent blocks.
By default, the block will not strongly power any face.

transform_relative.title: Transform Relative
transform_relative.description: If true, the "strongly_powered_face" and "connected_faces" properties will be rotated according to the "minecraft:transformation" component.
